metadata.file_name: B.J. Thomas - Raindrops Keep Fallin' on My Head (Rerecorded).flac
metadata.title: Raindrops Keep Fallin' on My Head (Rerecorded)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:04.79] Raindrops keep fallin' on my head
[00:09.29] And just like the guy
[00:11.69] Whose feet are too big for his bed
[00:14.82] Nothin' seems to fit
[00:17.13] Those raindrops are fallin'
[00:20.18] On my head, they keep fallin'
[00:23.35] So, I just did me some talkin' to the sun
[00:29.74] And I said, I didn't like
[00:32.20] The way he got things done
[00:35.59] Sleepin' on the job
[00:37.62] Those raindrops are fallin'
[00:41.68] On my head, they keep fallin'
[00:43.85] But there's one thing I know
[00:50.02] The blues they send
[00:52.51] To meet me won't defeat me (aah)
[00:56.62] It won't be long till
[00:59.89] Happiness steps up to greet me
[01:05.94] 
[01:08.97] Raindrops keep fallin' on my head
[01:13.25] But that doesn't mean
[01:15.14] My eyes will soon be turnin' red
[01:18.81] Cryin's not for me 'cause
[01:22.25] I'm never gonna stop the rain by complainin'
[01:27.10] Because I'm free, nothin's worryin' me
[01:35.58] 
[01:44.38] It won't be long till
[01:46.66] Happiness steps up to greet me
[01:52.80] 
[01:55.78] A raindrops keep fallin' on my head
[01:59.74] But that doesn't mean
[02:02.38] My eyes will soon be turnin' red
[02:05.52] Cryin's not for me 'cause
[02:08.75] I'm never gonna stop the rain by complainin'
[02:13.86] Because I'm free, nothin's worryin' me
[02:25.01]
